basic_details.short_information: HNGU Recruitment 2026: 17 Assistant Professor vacancies have been announced by Hemchandracharya North Gujarat University (HNGU), Patan. Eligible candidates can apply online through recruitment.hngu.ac.in from 25 May 2026 to 15 June 2026 and submit the required hardcopy application by 20 June 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Master's degree with minimum 55% marks (without grace marks) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or equivalent from an accredited foreign university + NET/SLET/SET cleared OR Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations (2009/2016)

qualification.education_qualification: B.Arch. with minimum 60% marks and 3 years of relevant professional experience; OR B.Arch. + Master's degree in Architecture/allied subjects with 60% marks at either level and 1 year of relevant professional experience

selection_process: Screening / Academic Score Shortlisting + Personal Interview (and Screening Test wherever necessary)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the University's recruitment portal at https://recruitment.HNGU .ac.in. Additionally, a physical hardcopy of the filled application form along with all supporting documents must be submitted separately.
seo_tags: HNGU Teaching Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 17 Assistant Professor Posts
